comment: Machine-readable refresh status — written by the nightly agent EVERY run, enforced by src/check-refresh.mjs against data/required-sources.json. This seed row-set reconstructs the 2026-07-14 run (the last before manifest enforcement) from its commit and the stored snapshot/asOf dates. Note the honest correction: that run's commit said 'full metrics refresh', but murlok/bloodmallet/mythicstats stayed at 2026-07-12 and SimC at 2026-07-09 — exactly the quiet drift this manifest exists to make impossible.
summary: Frost Mage PTR writeup, tier lists + Archon extras refreshed (22 rating moves, WoWMeta mplus broadest revision yet); murlok/bloodmallet/mythicstats/SimC not refreshed; WCL still unreachable
